commands.review_summary:
The PR swaps bundled document-extract PDF handling from pdfjs-dist/@napi-rs/canvas to clawpdf, updates PDF docs, dependency ownership/allowlists, lockfiles/shrinkwrap, and an approval prompt typing line.

PR surface: Source -169, Tests +14, Docs 0, Config -8, Other -511. Total -674 across 14 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking PR defect: the pinned codeload archive exports dist files but the source archive has no dist entries. I did not run an install because this review was read-only.

target.title: [codex] Use clawpdf for PDF extraction
target.body:
## Summary

- Replace the bundled PDF extraction runtime from PDF.js/canvas to `clawpdf`.
- Keep the document-extract plugin contract stable: text-first extraction, image fallback, base64 PNG results, selected page filtering, and image error callback behavior.
- Update docs, dependency ownership, Knip allowlists, pnpm lock, and npm shrinkwrap.

## Notes

- `clawpdf` is pinned to the public codeload tarball for commit `2b942755f7ae3d1d8ba6bb219cb3bc1b589069b1` so the API can be reviewed before publishing npm `0.2.0`.
- Once the API is accepted and `clawpdf@0.2.0` is published, this dependency should switch from the tarball pin to the npm version before release.

## Verification

- `pnpm deps:shrinkwrap:root:check`
- `pnpm exec vitest run extensions/document-extract/document-extractor.test.ts src/media/pdf-extract.test.ts src/media/document-extractors.runtime.test.ts src/plugins/document-extractors.runtime.test.ts test/scripts/root-dependency-ownership-audit.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:docs`
- Built-plugin smoke: extracted `Hello ClawPDF` from a minimal PDF through `dist/extensions/document-extract/document-extractor.js`
- `$autoreview`: clean, no accepted/actionable findings

## Known Baseline

- `pnpm build` still hits the existing plugin-SDK DTS error in `src/plugin-sdk/approval-reaction-runtime.ts:300` (`ApprovalActionView.kind`); this file is untouched by this PR.
target.author: steipete
